comoFuncionaCalculoHoras.titulo: How time calculation works on My Clock

introducao.paragrafo1: My Clock was developed to reproduce as faithfully as possible the calculation rules practiced by the company, allowing each employee to monitor their hours worked, overtime and estimated gross pay.
introducao.paragrafo2: Below is the explanation of how calculations are performed within the application.

secao1.paragrafo1: Each employee has an official shift start time, which may vary depending on the team or sector.
secao1.paragrafo2: This schedule is the main basis for calculating hours worked.

secao2.destaque1: the shift start time or actual entry time, whichever is later.
regras: If you arrive before your scheduled time, there will be no extra payment
If you arrive late, the calculation starts from the actual time of your entry
secao2.paragrafo3: In other words, arriving early does not add up to overtime.

secao3.paragrafo1: Upon departure, each minute worked is counted normally.
secao3.paragrafo3: Every minute after work is considered.

secao4.paragrafo1: The minimum unpaid break is 30 minutes.
secao4.destaque1: 30 minutes or the actual break time, whichever is longer.
secao4.paragrafo3: Less than 30 minutes will never be discounted.

secao5.paragrafo1: Overtime is calculated weekly, not daily.
secao5.paragrafo2: The main base considers the total hours worked from Monday to Friday.

secao6.paragrafo2: They are considered normal hours and paid at the normal contractual hourly rate.

secao7.paragrafo3: will be paid with an additional amount of:

secao8.paragrafo2: will be paid with an additional amount of:

secao9.paragrafo1: Saturday enters as a continuation of the week.
secao9.paragrafo2: Depending on the total already accumulated from Monday to Friday:
secao9.paragrafo3: If by Friday you have already exceeded 43 hours, normally the entire Saturday will be calculated as Overtime B.

secao10.paragrafo1: All hours worked on Sunday are paid as:
secao10.paragrafo3: There is no normal time on Sunday.

secao11.paragrafo2: These calculations help with personal control, payroll checking and requesting a review from HR when necessary.

importante.paragrafo1: My Clock is a support tool for personal conferencing.
importante.paragrafo2: It seeks to reproduce the rules practiced by the company as faithfully as possible, however the company's official system and internal rules always prevail in case of divergence.
importante.paragrafo3: Therefore, any difference in payment must be validated directly with the responsible HR.
